summary: Tested Invoice Settings feature: Company Details, Logo & VAT, Bank Details sections in TaxesTab > Invoice Settings. Backend: 26/26 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements present and working - save buttons functional, data persists after reload, logo preview works. Fixed minor JSX rendering issue: & entity in button label.

ui_bugs.issue: 'Save Logo & VAT' button label was rendering literal '&' instead of '&' due to HTML entity in JSX string expression. FIXED: changed "Save Logo & VAT" to "Save Logo & VAT" in TaxesTab.tsx line 812.

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: TaxesTab.tsx line 812 - 'Save Logo & VAT' JSX string used HTML entity literal; changed to 'Save Logo & VAT'
Company Details section correctly shows company_name, company_email, company_phone, company_address
Logo & VAT section shows logo_url (with preview when URL valid) and vat_number
Bank Details section shows all 6 fields: bank_name, account_name, account_number, sort_code, iban, bic
All 3 save buttons (company-details-save-btn, logo-vat-save-btn, bank-details-save-btn) call the same save() function which PUTs to /api/admin/taxes/invoice-settings
GET /api/admin/taxes/invoice-settings returns all new fields including bank_details object
PDF (admin download) contains Bank Details section with bank_name, sort_code, IBAN, BIC
PDF contains VAT Registration No and Payment Terms in footer
Partner download endpoint reads same platform invoice_settings - works correctly
seed_data_creation: Backend tests set invoice_settings: vat_number=GB 123 456 789, bank_details.bank_name=Barclays Bank, sort_code=20-00-00, iban=GB29 BARC 2000 0012 3456 78, bic=BARCGB22, payment_terms=Net 30. UI tests changed company_name=Test Company Ltd, sort_code=30-20-10.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invoice Settings feature fully tested. Admin auth: code='automate-accounts', email=admin@automateaccounts.local, pw=ChangeMe123!. Partner auth: code='test-partner-co', email=testpartner@example.com, pw=TestPass123!. Known partner order ID for PDF tests: 28987c23-5ae4-447e-a199-710456191278. Invoice Settings is in Admin > Taxes > Invoice Settings tab (data-testid: taxes-tab-invoices). All 15 form elements have data-testid attributes. All 3 section save buttons work and show 'Invoice settings saved' toast. PDF generation verified to include bank details, VAT, payment terms.
